output: Verified batch 3 task `T5` and checkpointed the result. `TimelineCanvas.tsx` already had the pinned-shot-group adjacent-resize wiring in place; this pass confirmed the neighbor resolution, dual resize overrides, grouped-edge snap bypass, primary-drag min-duration clamp, and single `onActionResizeEnd` callback shape, and removed stray shot-group debug logging. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` still fails only on the known pre-existing `data-shot-group-kind='pinned'` assertion, and the required full `npx vitest run` still fails broadly on unrelated pre-existing workspace issues (27 failed files / 54 failed tests total).
deviations: The core `T5` auto-shift implementation was already present in the shared workspace before this batch; this pass verified it and only removed stray debug logging from `TimelineCanvas.tsx`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified the existing TimelineCanvas auto-shift wiring: pointer-down resolves the adjacent clip from the pinned shot group, drag writes resize overrides for both clips, snap-to-sibling is skipped only for interior grouped edges, primary drag clamps to preserve adjacent min duration, and resize end emits one callback with the adjacent payload while clearing both overrides. Removed stray shot-group debug logging from TimelineCanvas during this pass. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` still fails only on the known pre-existing `data-shot-group-kind='pinned'` assertion, and the required full `npx vitest run` still fails broadly on unrelated pre-existing workspace issues (27 failed files / 54 failed tests total).

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: TimelineCanvas resolves the grouped neighbor at resize pointer-down, carries both clip overrides through drag, skips `snapResize` only when an interior grouped neighbor is present, clamps the primary edge to protect the adjacent clip's minimum duration, and calls `onActionResizeEnd` exactly once with the adjacent payload before clearing both overrides.
